rawIntent: Add a leave-request module under src/modules/leave with POST /leave-requests (create) and GET /leave-requests (list, optionally filtered by ?status=). A leave request has employeeId, startDate, endDate, reason, status (pending|approved|rejected). Persist via the shared db layer.

successCriteria.description: The leave-request module is created under src/modules/leave with endpoints POST /leave-requests and GET /leave-requests.
Leave requests can be created with employeeId, startDate, endDate, reason, and status.
Leave requests can be listed and optionally filtered by status.
All state-changing operations produce an audit record.
Role-based access control is enforced by middleware on every route.
All request bodies are validated with Zod (or equivalent) before reaching the business logic.

constraints: Every state-changing operation produces an audit record
RBAC enforced at middleware, never inline
Input validated at the API boundary
